title: Avoid Repeating Unary Prefix Operators
description: Repeating unary prefix operators (!, ~, -, +, ++, --) can lead to confusion and potential bugs. While technically correct, it can obfuscate the meaning of the code. This rule identifies such repetitions.
recommendation: Refactor the code to avoid repetition of unary prefix operators. Consider breaking complex expressions into simpler ones for clarity.
impact: Improves code readability and reduces potential for bugs caused by operator precedence confusion.

checks.message: Avoid repeating unary prefix operators for clarity.
